query:
INSERT INTO missions (title, description, xp_reward, gems_reward, category, is_active, order_index)
VALUES
  ('Save Your First $10', 'Put $10 into a savings account or a dedicated savings jar this week. This single action builds the habit that separates builders from spenders.', 50, 10, 'money', true, 1),
  ('Learn What Credit Is', 'Research what a credit score is, how it is calculated, and why it matters. Write down 3 things you learned.', 30, 6, 'money', true, 2),
  ('Track Spending for 1 Day', 'For one full day, write down every dollar you spend or see spent around you. At the end of the day, review the list.', 40, 8, 'money', true, 3)
ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING;
